```bash
`r config$remote$head_prompt` ls /export/spack/opt/spack/linux-rocky9-x86_64_v3/gcc-11.5.0/python-3.13.1-l4e6fblxgvpiiokcstye4x7puxi4722q/bin
```

```output
idle3     pydoc3     python   python3.13         python3.13-gdb.py  python-config
idle3.13  pydoc3.13  python3  python3.13-config  python3-config
```
